beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Real Madrid have won 21 of their last 24 matches against Getafe in LaLiga, scoring a total of 55 goals  and conceding just 10 during this period. Getafe have only picked up points in two of their 20 away matches against Real Madrid in LaLiga.
